rulings.Case Title: GAVIN G. HANLIN ET AL VS. SOJOURN PROPERTIES INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 29, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT ROBERT PECHOULTRES, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ROBERT, ROBERT PECHOULTRES NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS Hearing required to address if proper to stay pending appeal. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SUZANNE SCHORNACK VS. PERRY BOUSSINA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 29, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANT BRETT GIBBS, NILS ROSENQUEST MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Complaint is GRANTED in part, and DENIED in part. Defendant's Motion to Strike paragraph 9 of the Complaint is DENIED as not a "claim" within the meaning of CCP 425.16 and Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376. Defendants' Motion to Strike the first sentence of paragraph 14 of the Complaint is DENIED as not protected activity under CCP 425.16. Defendants' Motion to Strike the second and third sentences of paragraph 14 of the Complaint is GRANTED as protected activity under CCP 425.16. No opposition filed to raise the second prong of Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376. Defendants' Motion to Strike paragraph 21 of the Complaint is DENIED. The Complaint is so uncertain as to the dates of the events in question it is impossible to determine if CCP 425.16(e)(2) applies. Defendants' Motion to Strike paragraph 29 of the Complaint is GRANTED as protected activity under CCP 425.16. No opposition filed to raise the second prong of Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376. Defendants' Motion to Strike paragraph 44 of the Complaint is GRANTED as protected activity under CCP 425.16. No opposition filed to raise the second prong of Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376. Defendants' Motion to Strike subsection 6 of paragraph 47 of the Complaint is GRANTED as protected activity within the meaning of CCP 425.16. No opposition filed to raise the second prong of Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376. Defendants' Motion to Strike subsection 7 of paragraph 47 of the Complaint is DENIED. The Complaint is so uncertain as to the dates of the events in question it is impossible to determine if CCP 425.16(e)(2) applies. Defendants' Motion to Strike subsection 8 of paragraph 47 of the Complaint is GRANTED as protected activity within the meaning of CCP 425.16. No opposition filed to raise the second prong of Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376. Defendant's Motion to Strike paragraph 94 of the Complaint is DENIED as not a "claim" that applies to Attorney Defendants within the meaning of CCP 425.16 and Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376.=(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JIMMY CHERRY JR VS. WINDY R BRYANT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-594979 WITH CASE CUD-21-668280
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 29, 2023 line 5. PLAINTIFF JIMMY CHERRY, DELPHINE CHERRY Amended MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-594979 WITH CASE CUD-21-668280 is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.350(a)(1). "A notice of motion to consolidate must: (A) List all named parties in each case, the names of those who have appeared, and the names of their respective attorneys of record; (B) Contain the captions of all the cases sought to be consolidated, with the lowest numbered case shown first; and (C) Be filed in each case sought to be consolidated. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
